name: Walnut Spice Cake with Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 8
Preheat oven to 350°F. Butter an 8-inch square baking dish. Sift the first six ingredients together. Whisk the egg and sugar in a large bowl until well blended. Whisk in the butter and lemon peel. Combine hot water, molasses, and honey in a separate cup.
Add to the butter mixture alternately with dry ingredients, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Mix in the walnuts. Transfer to the prepared dish. Bake until springy to touch, about 50 minutes. Cool cake slightly on a rack.
Cut cake into squares. Serve warm or at room temperature, spooning lemon curd over each piece.
